SEARCH
Package com.boschrexroth.api

Interface ClientResponseCallback

public interface ClientResponseCallback
Callback interface for asynchronous DLR_CLIENT_RESPONSE calls. This interface will be implemented by Java code and passed to the native layer.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onResponse(Result result, Variant data)
    Called when an asynchronous DLR client request is ready.

  • Method Details

    • onResponse

      void onResponse(Result result, Variant data)
      Called when an asynchronous DLR client request is ready.
      Parameters:
      result - Result The response status from the native call.
      data - Variant The response data from the native call.
